titleStmt.title: SII 17.767: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 767. (A.R. No. 710 of 1904.) NEḌUṄGUṆAM, WANDIWASH TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the Dīrghāchalēśvara temple.
The details of date viz., Śaka 1518, Durmukhi, Makara śu. 7, Friday, correspond 1597 A.D., January, ·14, ·78.

This inscription records the gift of 15 poṉ being the amount realised from the tax levied from the village Mōśipāḍi, by Dinakara Piḷḷai, of Tōvūr, on behalf of Achchutappa-nāyakkarayyaṉ for conducting the daily pūjā for the deity Iśāṉa-nayiṉār, with 1/2 paṇam daily, for the merit of Dīkshitarayyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmaṉmakāmaṇṭalecuraṉ śrīvirappiṟatāpa śrīviraveṅkaṭapatideva makārāyar piṟitilī rācciyam paṇṇi
aruḷāniṉṟa cakāttam 1000 5 100 8 ṉ mel cellāniṉṟa tuṉmuki camvasarattu makara nāyaṟ pūrvapakṣattu cattamiyum cukkiṟa vāramum peṟṟa Iṟṟai
nāḷ neṭuṅkuṉṟam yīcāṉa nayiṉār tampirāṉāṟku tiṉappūcaikku tiṉamoṉṟukku paṇam Araiyāka Accutappa nāyakkar Ayyaṉ dikṣitar Ayyaṉukkup
puṇṇiyamākak (ka)kaṭṭaḷaikkut tovūrt tiṉakara piḷḷaik kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭa mocipāṭikku kovappaṭṭu meṉkāval �10 5 Intap poṉ patinañcum Upaiyamāka kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭom
Inta taṟmam cantiṟātittavaraiyum naṭakkak kaṭavatākavum mocipāṭi meṉkāval caṟuvamāṉiya mākak kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭom Inta taṟmattukku Akitam paṇṇi
ṉa per Uṇṭāṉāl keṅkai karaiyile kārāmpacuvaik koṉṟa toṣattile poka kaṭavarkaḷākavum
Digital edition of SII 17.767 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
